title: pavonia hastata f. belophylla
intro: Pavonia hastata f. belophylla, also known as Rose mallow or Pavonia, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Malvaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the lymphatic system and promote wound healing. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Pavonia hastata f. belophylla are often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal benefits.
